trait.name: Air Form
entries: The guardian can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) bludgeoning damage.
If the attack has success, the target is pushed up to 10 feet away from the guardian in a direction of the guardian's choosing.

This Air Guardian is a supplement of the book {@link Faeries of Warlock Homebrew|https://www.dmsguild.com/product/262305/WH-Faeries-A-tiny-fey-race-of-enchanting-nobles-bold-warriors-and-whimsical-travelers}
